title: Bucket, we'll do it live!
description: Have 10 buckets of dechlorinated water in your inventory. For some reason.

dialogue.text: Hellooooo adventurer! You know what I find truly fascinating? Water! There's so much of it! I want all of it! Get me water! Lots of water!

options.text: I have the 10 buckets ... that took awhile!

dialogue.text: Hauling water isn't glamorous, but it's great practice for future hydroponic adventures. Keep those buckets coming until you've collected ten of them.
You managed to wrangle all ten buckets of dechlorinated water. That's a lot of arm work!
Ahhh, you're the best, adventurer! Have I ever told you that? You're the best! I give you this shiny liquid award!
